# Jupyter and Reproducibility

## Draft focus

Introduce notebooks, scripts, environments, and the difference between exploratory work and reusable workflows.

## Starter example

```{python}
import platform
import sys

{
    "python_version": sys.version.split()[0],
    "platform": platform.platform(),
}
```

## Draft note

Connect reproducibility to lab culture, not only to software best practices.
